deploy.startCommand: (timeout 90 alembic upgrade head || echo '>>> ALEMBIC FALLO O SUPERO 90s — la app arranca igual; revisar migraciones a mano') ; exec gunicorn app.main:app --worker-class uvicorn.workers.UvicornWorker --workers 2 --bind 0.0.0.0:${PORT:-8000} --timeout 120 --keep-alive 5 --log-level info
